notes: Passive - extracts the username from the current Instagram profile URL (instagram.com/<username>) and opens 'https://threads.net/@<username>' in a new tab via window.open. Does not show an in-page modal, so we can't assert on the new tab's content in headless CI. Fails with alert('This is not an Instagram page.') if the URL doesn't contain 'instagram.com/'. We just check no_js_errors.
